description_long: This object is a detailed representation of a crab, featuring a broad, slightly domed carapace with a mottled brown and gray coloration. The crab has long, slender legs radiating outward, each jointed and tapering to a fine point, giving it a spindly appearance. Two prominent claws are visible at the front, with one slightly raised, and the claws are robust compared to the delicate walking legs. The carapace is textured with subtle ridges and bumps, and the underside is lighter in color. Small, stalked eyes are positioned at the front corners of the carapace, and thin antennae extend forward. The overall form is naturalistic, with anatomical accuracy in the segmentation and articulation of limbs.
description: A realistic crab with a broad, textured carapace, long spindly legs, and prominent front claws, colored in mottled browns and grays.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's face, both claws, and the symmetrical spread of its long legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the carapace, the curvature of the legs, and one claw more prominently.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the domed back of the carapace and the arrangement of the legs from behind.
description_view_3: Oblique rear-side view emphasizing the segmentation of the body and the splayed orientation of the legs.
